issues.sample: This is a 2021 Vehicle, and beginning in April of 2022, I have been telling my dealer that there is something wrong, but they haven't been able to fix it.  When I am driving, there are times when the car will fail to accelerate.  Also at times it feels like I have been rear ended

narrative.headline: What 2021 Infiniti Qx80 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Vehicle Speed Control (33% of reports).
